questions: Were all 8 implementation steps completed as planned?
Do all quality gates pass (typecheck, build, tests, CLI --version)?
Are all npm install -g git+https references removed from the codebase?
Does the update module use GitHub REST API with staged download-validate-swap?

answers.answer: All 8 implementation steps were completed: (1) build-release.yml created, (2) auto-tag.yml deleted, (3) check.ts rewritten with GitHub REST API and auth token discovery, (4) validate.ts rewritten for staged directory validation, (5) perform.ts rewritten with staged download-extract-validate-swap mechanism, (6) index.ts updated with new orchestration flow and GitHub auth error messaging, (7) documentation updated in 4 files to remove npm install references, (8) all quality gates pass.
evidence: .github/workflows/build-release.yml created with push-to-main trigger, contents: write, concurrency group, build/test/tarball/release steps
.github/workflows/auto-tag.yml deleted - confirmed file does not exist
src/update/check.ts exports fetchLatestRelease() using api.github.com, getGitHubToken() for auth discovery
src/update/validate.ts exports validateStaged() checking dist/index.js existence and --version
src/update/perform.ts exports performStagedUpdate() with staging dir, tar extraction, rename-based swap, backup/rollback
src/update/index.ts uses fetchLatestRelease, performStagedUpdate, explicit auth error with GITHUB_TOKEN/GH_TOKEN/gh auth login
src/docs/cli-content.ts, src/skill/show.ts, src/skill/paths.ts updated to remove npm install references

answers.answer: All quality gates pass: npx tsc --noEmit exits 0 with no errors, npm run build exits 0, npm test exits 0 with all 51 tests passing, node dist/index.js --version outputs '1.3.4'.
evidence: npx tsc --noEmit completed with no output (exit code 0)
npm run build completed with exit code 0
npm test: 51 tests passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped

answers.answer: Zero npm install -g git+https references remain in source code, skill content, or workflow files. Grep across src/, skill-content/, and .github/ all return zero matches. GIT_INSTALL_SPEC constant has been removed.
evidence: grep 'npm install -g git+https' across src/ returns 0 matches
grep 'npm install -g git+https' across skill-content/ returns 0 matches
grep 'npm install -g git+https' across .github/ returns 0 matches

answers.answer: The update module uses the GitHub REST API (GET /repos/{owner}/{repo}/releases/tags/latest) via native fetch() for release discovery, replacing git ls-remote. The staged update mechanism downloads the tarball to ~/.hlx/staging/<sha>/, extracts via system tar, validates with validateStaged() (entrypoint existence + --version check), then does a rename-based swap with .bak backup directories for rollback.
evidence: perform.ts line 44: safeRename with EXDEV fallback and Windows retry
validate.ts line 14: validateStaged() checks dist/index.js and runs --version with HLX_SKIP_UPDATE_CHECK=1

statement: Implementation complete. All 8 plan steps executed: build-release.yml CI workflow created, auto-tag.yml deleted, src/update/ module rewritten (check.ts, validate.ts, perform.ts, index.ts) with GitHub REST API and staged download-validate-swap mechanism, documentation updated in 4 files. All quality gates pass: typecheck, build, 51 tests, CLI --version. Zero npm install -g git+https references remain. publish.yml preserved unchanged. Fail-open (auto-update) / fail-closed (manual update) behavior preserved. Explicit GitHub auth error messaging implemented.
